fat-grannys-minestrone-soup.name: Fat Granny's Minestrone Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Diced san marzano tomatoes with juice

instructions: Combine Italian seasoning, onion powder, garlic powder, celery seed, parsley, thyme, basil, oregano, salt, black pepper, and bay leaf in a small bowl.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until cooked through but firm to the bite, 8 minutes. Drain.

Heat olive oil and butter together in a large saucepan over medium-high heat; cook and stir carrot, celery, and onion until heated through, 2 to 3 minutes. Add garlic, green bell pepper, red bell pepper, zucchini, and Italian seasoning mixture; stir to combine.

Stir tomatoes and their juice, tomato sauce, three bean salad, green beans, and chicken stock into seasoned vegetable mixture. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are blended, about 30 minutes. Stir in elbow macaroni before serving.

feta-spinach-puff-pastry-bites.name: Feta-spinach Puff Pastry Bites
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (180 degrees C). Spray cups of a 24-cup mini muffin pan (or 2 12-cup mini muffin pans) with nonstick cooking spray.

Roll out the thawed but cold puff pastry sheet on a lightly floured surface into a rectangle using a rolling pin. Cut into 24 (approximately 2 1/2-inch) squares using a pizza cutter. Lightly press puff pastry squares into each cup of the prepared mini muffin pan and prick with the tines of a fork.
Mix the mayonnaise, feta cheese, Parmesan cheese, spinach, garlic, and pepper together in a bowl.
Spoon feta-spinach mixture evenly into the cups, being careful not to overflow the cups.
Bake in the preheated oven until pastry is puffed and the corners are golden brown, 15 to 16 minutes.
Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 5 minutes before transferring the bites to a serving dish.

filo-pastry-pies-with-chicken-and-almond.name: Filo Pastry Pies With Chicken And Almonds
filo-pastry-pies-with-chicken-and-almond.original_name: Empadas de massa filo com galinha e amêndoas

ingredients.item: Salada de tomates-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa para acompanhar
Use good quality phylum mass because its lightness and crocance are essential.

Laminated almonds can be lightly toasted before using to enhance the flavor.
A salada de tomate-cereja, cebola roxa e salsa oferece um contraste refrescante e equilibrado ao prato principal.

fish-stew-teleculinaria.name: Fish Stew

ingredients.item: 800 g assorted fish (tamboril, cod, hake, sapphire, ling)
800 g rustic bread on the eve

instructions: Cut the bread into thin slices and dispose of it on a deep platter. Peel off the onions and garlic and cut them into slices. Remove the seeds from the peppers and cut them into thick strips.

Bring a pot to the fire with the olive oil and the laurel. Add the onion and garlic and let it shine. Add the water, season with the pepper paste, the colorau, the pouring, thyme, oregano, salt and pepper and let it boil.

Add the fish and let it cook. Add the peppers and correct the spices. Remove the fish with a skimmer and place them on the bread. Lay the broth on top, carefully, and cover with adherent film or a lid. Wait about 7 minutes and serve in a row.

fish-treats-with-yogurt-sauce-teleculina.name: Fish Treats With Yogurt Sauce
fish-treats-with-yogurt-sauce-teleculina.original_name: Mimos de pescada com molho de iogurte
instructions: Put the fish in a bowl and season it with salt and pepper. Take a pot to the fire with water, white wine, pepper beans, salt, parsley and coriander stalks, bull and add the fish, cook for 10 minutes and remove.

Wash, peel and peel the vegetables so that they are even in size. Take a frying pan to the fire with the olive oil, add the vegetables and let it saute for a few minutes. Season with salt and pepper and remove.
In a bowl, put the yogurt with parsley, coriander and lemon juice, brush and season with salt and pepper.
Lay out the sauce on the fish, accompany the vegetables and serve next.

fresh-orange-apple-chutney.name: Fresh Orange-apple Chutney
instructions: Cut all peel and white pith from oranges, following contour of fruit. Cut segments into 1/3-inch cubes; place in medium bowl. Add all remaining ingredients; toss to blend. Season to taste with salt. DO AHEAD Can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

fresh-southern-peach-cobbler.name: Fresh Southern Peach Cobbler

ingredients.prep: pitted and sliced into thin wedges

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Combine peaches, 1/4 cup white sugar, 1/4 cup brown sugar, 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon, nutmeg, lemon juice, and cornstarch in a large bowl; toss to coat evenly, and pour into a 2-quart baking dish. Bake in preheated oven for 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, combine flour, 1/4 cup white sugar, 1/4 cup brown sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Blend in butter with your fingertips or a pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in water until just combined.
Remove peaches from oven, and drop spoonfuls of topping over them.
Mix 3 tablespoons white sugar and 1 teaspoon cinnamon together in a small bowl; sprinkle over entire cobbler.
Bake in the preheated oven until topping is golden, about 30 minutes.

fresh-sweet-cranberry-sauce-with-a-twist.name: Fresh Sweet Cranberry Sauce With A Twist
instructions: Stir sugar, water, and cinnamon together in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Add cranberries to the boiling water mixture and cook until they begin to pop, about 10 minutes. Pour cranberry mixture into a glass bowl.
Refrigerate, stirring occasionally, until completely chilled.

fried-chicken-sandwich-with-slaw-and-spi.name: Fried Chicken Sandwich With Slaw And Spicy Mayo
instructions: Mix garlic, mayonnaise, and hot pepper sauce in a small bowl; cover and chill. Toss onion, jalapeño, cabbage, pickles, and pickle juice in a large bowl to combine; cover and chill.

Whisk flour, pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a shallow bowl. Pour buttermilk into another shallow bowl. Working with 1 piece at a time, dredge chicken in flour mixture, shaking off excess. Dip in buttermilk, allowing excess to drip back into bowl. Dredge again in flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Pour oil into a large heavy skillet to a depth of 1/2". Prop deepfry thermometer in oil so bulb is submerged. Heat over medium heat until thermometer registers 177°C.

Fry chicken until golden brown and cooked through, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a baking sheet; season with salt. Spread cut sides of rolls with butter. Heat another large skillet over medium heat. Working in batches, cook rolls buttered side down until browned and crisp, about 1 minute.
Spread with spicy mayo. Build sandwiches with rolls, chicken, and cabbage slaw.

fried-chicken-wings.name: Fried Chicken Wings
instructions: Season chicken wings lightly with seasoned salt.

Mix flour, salt, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and paprika together in a wide, shallow bowl. Press wings into flour mixture to coat and arrange in a single layer on a large plate. Refrigerate coated wings for 15 to 30 minutes.
Dredge wings again in flour mixture and return to the plate. Refrigerate wings once more for 15 to 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Fry chicken wings in hot oil until crisp and juices run clear, 10 to 12 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the meat, near the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Transfer fried wings to a large bowl. Drizzle sauce over wings and toss to coat.
Serve and enjoy!

fried-halloumi-cheese-salad-lezzet.name: Fried Halloumi Cheese Salad
instructions: 1. Wash Marul and roka leaves with plenty of water.
2. Take the filter to filter the water.
3. Take the water in the bark and the serving plate in large parts.
4. Place the cherry tomatoes into the breaks by splitting them into two.
5. Take the butter in the pan and melt it.
6. slice Hellim cheese 1 cm thick and gently fry the pan with both sides.
7. Directory of fried cheese slices on salad.
8. Tighten the juice of lemon and stir with olive oil.
9. Add salt and pour the sauce on the salad.
10. Dilerseniz, bol malzemeli hellim peynirli salata tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

fried-zucchini-blossoms.name: Fried Zucchini Blossoms
instructions: Whisk flour and olive oil in a large bowl to combine (dry, pea-size balls will form). Add 3/4 cup warm water; whisk until a smooth, thick pancake-like batter forms. Whisk in 2 tsp. salt. Let batter rest, uncovered, at room temperature for 1–2 hours.

Pour vegetable oil into a large heavy high-sided skiller to a depth of 1/2". Prop deep-fry thermometer in oil so bulb is submerged. Heat over medium heat until thermometer registers 375° in a heavy, high-sided large skillet until a candy-thermometer attached to side of skillet registers 375°.
Beat egg whites until medium-stiff peaks form; gently whisk one third of the white into batter to loosen, then gently fold in the rest of the whites until just incorporated.

Working in batches of 6, dip blossoms in batter, letting excess batter drip back into bowl. Fry, turning occasionally, until golden and crispy, 3–4 minutes per batch. Transfer to paper towels. Season with salt; serve hot.

fried-zucchini-chips-argiro.name: Fried Zucchini Chips

ingredients.item: 1 cup of flower for all uses
1 cup of flower for all uses

instructions: Wash the pumpkins, dry them and cut them into mandolin in very thin -almost transparent - slices, with diagonal inclusion, holding the oblongs.
If we don't have mandolin, cut them with a sharp knife in transparent, very think slides, 3-4 mm think.
Add the zucchini slides to a large train and sprinkle them with a little salt.
Mix and allow them to sweat for 5-10 minutes.
Mix flower and semolina in a large bowl.
Add the pumpkins in doses and make them all around with the mixture.
Heat the oil in a deep pan, as soon as it burns, dip each slide of zucchini in a bowl with cold water and pour it into the pan immediately.
Repeat with quick moves and fry the zucchini for 2 minutes, until golden and crispy.
We make them smooth on absorbent paper to draw off unnecessary oil.
We also fry the rest of the pubkins.
While warm, sprinkle themm with a little salt blushom.
They are reserved crispy until the last bit, even when cold.

frogmore-stew.name: Frogmore Stew
instructions: Bring water and Old Bay seasoning to a boil in a large stockpot over high heat.
Add potatoes; cook for 15 minutes. Add sausage; cook for 5 more minutes. Add corn; cook for 5 more minutes. Stir in shrimp; cook until shrimp are pink, about 5 minutes. Drain immediately and serve.

fruit-loaf.name: Fruit Loaf
instructions: Add water, oil, brown sugar, bread flour, gluten flour, milk powder, mixed spice, and yeast into the bread machine pan in the order suggested by the manufacturer. Select Fruit setting or the setting for Basic White Bread. Press Start.
If your machine has a Fruit setting, add the golden raisins and peel at the signal, or around 5 minutes before the kneading cycle has finished.

furikake-ranch-snack-mix.name: Furikake-ranch Snack Mix

ingredients.item: Bugles corn chips or oyster crackers

ingredients.prep: such as Snyder’s of Hanover Butter Snaps

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 250°. Heat ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, ⅓ cup light corn syrup, ¼ cup sugar, ¼ cup vegetable oil, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, and one 1-oz. packet ranch seasoning in a small saucepan, stirring, until sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat.

Mix 10 cups rice and/or corn cereal, 3 cups Bugles corn chips or oyster crackers, 2 cups mini windowpane pretzels, 2 cups Pepperidge Farm Goldfish Crackers, and 1 cup salted roasted peanuts in a large bowl with your hands, working from bottom to top.

Wearing disposable gloves, carefully pour butter mixture into bowl, mixing from bottom to top to incorporate. Sprinkle half of one 1.7-oz. bottle nori komi furikake over and toss until evenly coated. Sprinkle remaining half of one 1.7-oz. bottle nori komi furikake over and toss again to coat. Divide mixture between 2 rimmed baking sheets and bake, carefully tossing every 15–20 minutes and rotating pans back to front and top to bottom halfway through, until dry, about 1 hour (a humid day may require 15–30 minutes more). Let snack mix cool before serving.
Do ahead: Mix can be made 2 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
